rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion To Strike And Dismiss Third Amended Complaint And For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANTS ANDREW ZACKS and ZACKS & FREEDMAN, P.C.'s Special Motion To Strike And Dismiss Third Amended Complaint And For Attorneys Fees The Zacks parties' motion to strike, the Karsant parties' motion to strike and the Karsant parties' demurrer and all other proceedings in this case are STAYED per CCP 916(a) ("perfecting of an appeal stays proceedings in the trial court upon the¿order appealed from or upon the matters embraced therein or affected thereby"). All proceedings are also independently STAYED under the Court's power to control its process, e.g., to avoid duplicative discovery and trial. CCP 128(a)(8), Neman, 173 CA4th at 653. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants The Karsant Family Limited Partnership And Peter Karsants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike All Or Part Of The Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANTS THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP and PETER KARSANT's Motion To Strike All Or Part Of The Third Amended Complaint The Zacks parties' motion to strike, the Karsant parties' motion to strike and the Karsant parties' demurrer and all other proceedings in this case are STAYED per CCP 916(a) ("perfecting of an appeal stays proceedings in the trial court upon the¿order appealed from or upon the matters embraced therein or affected thereby"). rulings.Case Title: PAUL SALIBA VS. NAJIB EID SALIBA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS NAJIB EID SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SALIBA, HANAB SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE 2003 SALIBA, NAJIB SALIBA and HANAB SALIBA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to May 6, 2016. Defendants failed to comply with CCP 430.41. Among the failures: defendants did not "file and serve with the demurrer a declaration" stating compliance with CCP 430.41. See CCP 430.41(a)(3). Defendants also failed to comply with CCP 430.41(a) and 430.41(a)(1). The declaration defendants' counsel belatedly filed with her reply brief attaches correspondence in which she notably never used the word "demurrer." Defendant is ordered to immediately engage in meet and confer efforts. Defendant to file supplemental brief, not to exceed 7 pages, addressing unresolved issues by no later than April 19, 2016. Plaintiff shall file supplemental opposition, not to exceed 7 pages, by no later than April 29, 2016. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELYN QUINN VS. HARRISON GUNTHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF JACQUELYN QUINN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to April 6, 2016 to be heard at 9:15 a.m. in Department 306. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ALENA KUCERA ET AL VS. DANIEL WOODWORTH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT DANIEL WOODWORTH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant asserts the novel (and legally unsupported) argument that the three-day notice described the rented premises too specifically. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: LOURDES REYES VS. ROLANDO BAUTISTA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT ROLANDO BAUTISTA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Plaintiff may file a motion for leave to file a supplemental complaint. See CCP 464(a); Earp v. Nobman (1981) 122 Cal.App.3d 270 (disapproved on other grounds). = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. SARVENAZ PARVAHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required to address bankruptcy. Defendant to produce a copy of all her bankruptcy papers. Additionally, Defendant to provide a redacted (Social Security Number) copy of Official Form 121 to be replaced in the Court file. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. VS. CHRIS ROJAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT CHRIS ROJAS' Motion To Vacate Default and Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant providing a copy of his debit card and bank statement on the date of purported service by no later than 9:00 a.m. on April 1, 2016; and (2) Defendant filing an answer no later than April 1, 2016. If defendant remains in possession of the premises as of April 1, 2016, defendant shall also post $11,477.94 with the Court by no later than April 1, 2016 4:00 p.m. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ROMAN ROMERO VS. REMIGIO SANTANA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 01, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANTS REMIGIO CARRILLO and ARACELY MELGAR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege service of Form 1007 and to attach a complete copy of the Notice served on Defendant. = (501/RBU)
